data.title: SoundHound launches Vision AI for real-time visual understanding in conversational AI, integrating voice and visual capabilities in one platform.
data.description: SoundHound AI, Inc. (NASDAQ: SOUN), based in Santa Clara, California, unveiled Vision AI, an innovative visual understanding engine that is seamlessly integrated with SoundHound's voice-first platform. This cutting-edge technology combines voice and visual capabilities into a unified platform that mirrors the human brain's ability to process spoken language and visual context concurrently. By enabling the platform to listen, see, and interpret simultaneously, Vision AI marks a significant development in AI technology.By fusing voice and visual elements, the platform enhances conversational AI and intelligence. This launch signifies a shift towards more holistic AI solutions that cater to a diverse range of sensory inputs. SoundHound's goal is to create a more intuitive and efficient user experience by enabling their technology to analyze and respond to both auditory and visual stimuli. This integration is poised to revolutionize the field of AI, allowing for more nuanced and sophisticated interactions between users and technology.SoundHound AI, Inc.'s Vision AI launch represents a monumental step towards creating a more seamless and comprehensive AI experience. By incorporating advanced visual understanding capabilities into their existing voice AI platform, SoundHound aims to redefine how users interact with technology. This development is expected to significantly impact the future of AI technology and highlights SoundHound's commitment to innovation and user-centric design.

data.title: Headquartered in Calif, Backblaze will present on AI storage strategies at Ai4 2025 conference; Jeronimo De Leon to discuss "The AI Storage Pipeline Starts with Storage". #BLZE #AI
data.description: In San Mateo, California, Backblaze, Inc. (Nasdaq: BLZE) has revealed that Jeronimo De Leon, their Senior Product Manager for AI, is set to speak at the Ai4 2025 conference. The session titled "The AI Storage Pipeline Starts with Storage" will delve into the crucial role of storage in AI projects. Backblaze, a Gold-level sponsor at the conference, emphasizes the significance of a strong data foundation for AI success. The event will focus on how object storage supports AI advancements.

data.title: Visteon Corporation to participate in Q3 2025 investor conferences: J.P. Morgan Auto Conference in NY on Aug 12.
data.description: Visteon Corporation (NASDAQ: VC) of Van Buren Township, Michigan, revealed plans for involvement in key investor events in the third quarter of 2025. Among them is the J.P. Morgan Auto Conference in New York, NY on August 12, 2025. The company aims to engage with stakeholders and investors during these pivotal events to discuss future strategies and growth opportunities.

data.title: Homes.com report shows national median home price up 2.1% from a year ago in July, continuing moderate appreciation.
data.description: A report by Homes.com, a prominent online residential marketplace under CoStar Group, has investigated home price trends for July. Based on current data, preliminary findings reveal a 2.1% uptick in the median home price nationally in June. This increase is in line with the overall trend in 2021, characterized by a slowdown in home price growth. The data also indicates a steady average year-over-year price growth of 2.0% over the last six months. The report delves into price trends across various major metros and types of houses.

data.title: High-Trend Group's revenues rose 185% with strong leadership. Excels in green shipping and finance.
data.description: Singapore-based High-Trend International Group, listed on the NASDAQ as HTCO, a leading ocean technology company, has unveiled its financial performance for the six-month period ending on April 30, 2025. The report highlights the company's significant business growth. The company's total financial indicators for this period show...

data.title: Centrus Energy appoints Todd Tinelli as CFO, reinforcing leadership team commitment. News released on Aug 8, 2025.
data.description: Centrus Energy Corp. (NYSE American: LEU) based in Bethesda, Md., revealed on August 8, 2025, that Todd Tinelli will be joining the company as its Chief Financial Officer. This hiring reflects Centrus' dedication to upholding a top-tier leadership group. Todd Tinelli will assume the role of Senior Vice President as he takes on this new position.

data.title: Microchip Technology exceeds Q1 expectations, with earnings of 27 cents/share (vs est. 23 cents) & sales of $1.075 billion (vs est. $1.054 billion). Q2 adjusted EPS expected at 34-37 cents/share, with projected sales of $1.110-1.150 billion. CEO says fiscal 2026 shows strong start.
data.description: Microchip Technology (NASDAQ: MCHP) announced their first-quarter earnings surpassing expectations. They reported earnings of 27 cents per share, exceeding the estimated 23 cents per share. The quarterly sales stood at $1.075 billion, surpassing the expected $1.054 billion. For the second quarter, they anticipate adjusted EPS between 34 to 37 cents per share, while the market predicted 30 cents per share. In terms of sales, they are projecting $1.110 billion to $1.150 billion, compared to the expected $1.115 billion. CEO and President, Steve Sanghi, expressed optimism for Fiscal 2026, citing strong revenue growth. Visit Benzinga.com for more information.

data.title: RCI Hosting 3Q25 call on X Spaces w/ RICK reporting Q3 results on Aug 11 after market close, conference call at 4:30 PM ET.
data.description: Houston-based RCI Hospitality Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: RICK) is set to release its financial results for the fiscal 2025 third quarter ending June 30th after the closing of the market on Monday, August 11. The company will conduct a conference call on X Spaces at 4:30 PM ET. The call will feature RCI's President and CEO Eric Langan, CFO Bradley Chhay, and Mark Moran of Equity Animal. The call link is available at https://x.com/i/spaces/1OdJrDOQobXKX (X login required).

data.title: Lewis Hamilton and Casa Lumbre launch Almave Humo, a non-alcoholic mezcal, made with Espadin agave from Mexico.
data.description: Today, in New York, Almave, the inaugural non-alcoholic agave spirit, was introduced by Seven-Time Formula One™ Champion and Entrepreneur Lewis Hamilton alongside Master Distiller Iván Saldaña from Casa Lumbre Spirits. They have unveiled Almave Humo, a non-alcoholic substitute for mezcal. This new product, crafted using Espadin agave sourced at the base of the Popocatépetl volcano in Puebla, Mexico, offers a luxurious and smoky profile reminiscent of premium mezcal, but without any alcohol content.

data.title: Travis County partners with PeopleFund for TCTX Thrive 3.0, offering expanded support for businesses with training and capital access.
data.description: The third version of the program has been launched in Austin, Texas on August 8, 2025, aiming to enhance support for small businesses in Travis County. The program offers expanded training, coaching, and improved capital access throughout the county. The initiative intends to bolster the growth and success of local businesses by providing them with comprehensive resources.

data.title: Oncolytics Biotech® reports Q2 financial results, plans for Pelareorep program with key data for pancreatic cancer. New management team members bring clinical expertise.
data.description: A recent gathering of key opinion leaders highlighted exciting new clinical data on pancreatic cancer, emphasizing the importance of engaging with regulators for a registration-enabling study. The addition of new members to the management team has enhanced the company's capabilities in advancing clinical programs and successfully navigating biotech transactions. This development comes at a critical time as the company prepares to move forward with plans to initiate a pivotal study, reflecting a growing focus on addressing the unmet medical needs in pancreatic cancer.

data.title: Analysts cut forecasts on Atlassian after Q4; revenue up 22% to $1.38B, EPS beats at 98 cents vs. 86 cents estimated.
data.description: Atlassian Corp (NASDAQ: TEAM) released their financial results for the fourth quarter, as well as a new partnership with Alphabet Inc (NASDAQ: GOOG)(NASDAQ: GOOGL) on Thursday. The company's fourth-quarter revenue reached $1.38 billion, marking a 22% increase from the previous year. This exceeded the Street's consensus estimate of $1.36 billion as reported by Benzinga Pro. Atlassian also reported earnings per share of 98 cents, surpassing the Street's forecast of 86 cents per share. Closing out FY25, the company achieved over $5.2 billion in revenue, generated more than $1.4 billion in free cash flow, and more details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Techtronic Industries Co. Ltd. shrugs off trade pressures with 7.5% revenue growth and 14% profit rise in first half of the year.
data.description: Techtronic Industries Co. Ltd., a power tool maker, reported a 7.5% increase in revenue and a 14% rise in profits in the first half of the year. Despite heavy reliance on the U.S. market for sales and China for manufacturing, the company has avoided the impact of U.S.-China trade war tariffs so far. The company has diversified its manufacturing base by adding factories in the U.S., Vietnam, and Mexico. With about three-quarters of its sales coming from the U.S. market, Techtronic reassured investors in February that U.S. tariffs would have an "immaterial" impact on its results for the year. This strategy seems to have panned out as the latest earnings report showed strong financial performance for the company.

data.title: $4.5M hack at CrediX Finance leads to team disappearance. Stability DAO works to recover funds with 2 members' identification.
data.description: Stability DAO has confirmed the identification of two individuals from the CrediX Finance team and is collaborating with various projects and authorities to reclaim the embezzled funds.

data.title: Pure Harvest Corporate Group (OTC: PHCG) is now debt-free, signaling financial progress and entering a phase of strategic growth.
data.description: Pure Harvest Corporate Group (ticker symbol: PHCG) recently revealed that it has successfully eliminated all of its debt, a significant achievement in its financial revamp. This milestone comes as the Company solidifies its position in the market.

data.title: The North America hydroponics market projected to reach US$10.75 billion by 2033 from US$3.64 billion in 2024, with CAGR of 12.79% from 2025-2033.
data.description: A new report titled "North America Hydroponics Market Size and Share Analysis - Growth Trends and Forecast Report 2025-2033" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's portfolio. The North America Hydroponics Market is predicted to grow significantly, reaching a value of US$ 10.75 billion by 2033 compared to US$ 3.64 billion in 2024. This represents a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 12.79% from 2025 to 2033. The surge in the requirement for locally grown fruits and vegetables, the growing popularity of sustainable agriculture, technological advancements, and limitations in traditional farming methods are contributing factors to this growth.

data.title: Dow Jones futures rise with AMD as top mover. Shopify and Disney earnings due. Weak data impacts stocks.
data.description: Stocks in the AI sector, particularly AMD, showed strong earnings performance overnight alongside other companies. Notable ones expected to report soon include Shopify and Disney. However, overall market sentiment was impacted by poor economic indicators on Tuesday. Dow Jones futures are currently on the rise, primarily driven by the impressive earnings results of AMD and Shopify, according to Investor's Business Daily.
